text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that a festival is being held in the local
shopping district, Inari One and I decide to pay it
a visit.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heeey, I'm likin' the lively vibes! This is what I mean when I say festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? That's...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oguri! You're here too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I caught a whiff of something delicious, so I came
running straight over.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, that's so like you. Well then, how 'bout
takin' a stroll 'round the stalls together?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. I was just getting ready to go for a
second round.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What?! Ya already ate?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Inari One, myself, and Oguri Cap begin
walking around the festival. As we do...

text_block_list.name: Festival Event Staff A
text_block_list.text: What's that?! We can't carry the mikoshi shrine?!

text_block_list.name: Festival Event Staff B
text_block_list.text:
What should we do?! Everyone is already waiting
for us!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey? What's this? Are they arguin'?

text_block_list.name: Festival Event Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Long story short, a fire broke out nearby, and all
the folks who usually carry the mikoshi shrine
went to help out.

text_block_list.name: Festival Event Staff B
text_block_list.text:
All of the people who came to see it are gonna
leave if... Oh, I know! If you could help us—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Say no more! Ya want us to haul the shrine, right?

text_block_list.name: Festival Event Staff B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I know it's a lot to ask. But, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'd love to carry it, but I think we can help
in a different way.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can't manage it alone. So, Trainer, Oguri, think
you two could lend a hand?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Gather 'round! Ya can't afford to miss
this! The showdown of the century is 'bout to
start!

text_block_list.name: Festival Goer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What the heck? Where did all the yakisoba
and takoyaki go?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Behold, the queen of gluttony herself, Oguri Cap!
She's the demoness with an abyssal appetite!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hello, I'm the demoness with an abyssal appetite. Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Challengin' the queen is none other than me, Inari
One! The food's piled up like Mt. Fuji! First to
polish it all off's the winner!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's get it on! Reeeady... GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the support from the people at the
festival stalls and the shopping district, the eating
contest gets underway. A crowd gathers, excited
to spectate...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey! Lookie here! The star of the show's arrived!

text_block_list.name: Festival Palanquin Carriers
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho! Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Festival Goers
text_block_list.text: Oooh! The shrine is here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Betcha this excitement can be felt even
in the heavens. Right... shall we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What? We're done already? But we haven't
decided a winner...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We were just stallin' till the main act
arrived. Our job is done!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at the folks hoistin' the shrine. And
look at the sparkle in the crowd's eyes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Competin' for attention would just spoil the fun!
C'mon, let's wrap up the leftovers for later and
head out!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whew. Now that that's all over, I'm feelin' wiped!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The festival folks got to save face, and we bought
'em some time. Not too shabby, right?
choice_data_list:
I was hoping to crown a winner in that eating
contest.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The festival folks got to save face, and we bought
'em some time. Not too shabby, right?
choice_data_list:
I was hoping to crown a winner in that eating
contest.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, that's what I should be sayin' to you guys.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri really put on one helluva show. Guess it's
just business as usual for you though.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's not forget the one runnin' every which way
to gather up the food for the contest. That'd be
you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Sheesh... since when did you become so
dependable?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how our classy trio stepped up and
saved the festival from near disaster.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Ya wanna put me up against Oguri
for real?! Talk about cruel...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But we've still got the leftovers from earlier. Why
don't we pick up where we left off?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And you're still down to tussle? Well, in that case,
no way I'm backin' out!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Bring on th grub!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One stakes her Edo pride and steps up to
the plate only to be utterly defeated by Oguri
Cap's monstrous appetite.
